---
mode: agent
model: GPT-5.3-Codex
description: "Create a one-week sprint plan with multi-agent decomposition and acceptance criteria."
---

Create a one-week sprint plan using planning-first workflow.

Inputs:
- business objective
- current codebase constraints
- available manpower

Output:
1. Sprint objective
2. Scope in/out
3. Task list with owners
4. Dependencies and critical path
5. Acceptance checklist
6. Daily cadence
